context: Tests whether the agent correctly structures a Stimulus controller — using the right import, static declarations for targets/values/classes, proper registration, and applying Stimulus only where Turbo is insufficient.

checklist.name: Correct import
checklist.description: The Stimulus controller file imports Controller from '@hotwired/stimulus' (not from 'stimulus', 'stimulus-src', or any other path)

checklist.name: static targets declared
checklist.description: The controller uses 'static targets = [...]' to declare at least one target rather than using querySelector or getElementById directly

checklist.name: static values declared
checklist.description: The controller uses 'static values = { ... }' with typed value declarations (e.g., { count: Number } or { url: String }) to hold configuration

checklist.name: Typed values with defaults
checklist.description: At least one value in static values uses the object form with type and default (e.g., { type: Number, default: 0 }) rather than just the type shorthand

checklist.name: static classes declared
checklist.description: The controller uses 'static classes = [...]' to reference CSS class names rather than hardcoding class strings inside JavaScript methods

checklist.name: Registered in index.js
checklist.description: The controller is imported and registered in app/javascript/controllers/index.js (or app/javascript/controllers/application.js), not only in an ad-hoc script tag

checklist.name: Only where Turbo insufficient
checklist.description: Stimulus is applied only to behavior that cannot be handled by Turbo Frames or Turbo Streams alone (e.g., complex DOM manipulation, client-side validation, non-server-driven interactions)

checklist.name: data-controller attribute
checklist.description: The HTML uses a data-controller attribute to attach the Stimulus controller to the correct element

checklist.name: data-action attribute
checklist.description: User interactions are wired via data-action attributes (e.g., data-action="click->controller#method") rather than addEventListener in JavaScript

checklist.name: Validation approach noted
checklist.description: The implementation mentions or documents how to verify that the controller is connected (references application.getControllerForElementAndIdentifier or similar console check)

checklist.name: No Turbo duplication
checklist.description: The Stimulus controller does NOT replicate behavior that Turbo already handles natively (e.g., does not manually submit forms, does not manually update DOM after a Turbo Stream would handle it)
